query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pm_codes (
  id int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  pm_code varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  description text,
  status varchar(64),
  date_approved varchar(64),
  perform_every varchar(16),
  period_uom varchar(32),
  loto_required varchar(16),
  ptw_required varchar(16),
  uploaded_at timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  uploaded_by int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  CONSTRAINT pm_codes_id PRIMARY KEY(id)
);
command:

  id int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  pm_code varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  description text,
  status varchar(64),
  date_approved varchar(64),
  perform_every varchar(16),
  period_uom varchar(32),
  loto_required varchar(16),
  ptw_required varchar(16),
  uploaded_at timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  uploaded_by int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  CONSTRAINT pm_codes_id PRIMARY KEY(id)
);
